title: lagochilus bungei
intro: Lagochilus bungei, also known as Bunge's Lagochilus, is a plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Central Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Lagochilus bungei is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
